## Which is the default
`~/.local/share/chezmoi` **is** chezmoi's built-in default source directory. There's no config overriding it (no `~/.config/chezmoi/chezmoi.toml` — only `chezmoistate.boltdb`, which is just runtime state), so `chezmoi source-path` reports that default. **And that default directory doesn't exist on this machine** — nothing was ever initialized there.
